chunks.title: video
chunks.text: next i am going to share something extra related to python which is style guide

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: style guide is basically a way to write things

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: there are many things which are allowed in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for example i want to create a variable called total price

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way we can create a variable total price, total price is 100 rupees let's suppose

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so this name of this variable identifier we can write in another way also

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can write it as tototal and Pric

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: or we can start it with T and write total price in this way also

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so there are different styles of writing a single variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this style of writing a variable we call snake case

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in which we use an underscore and all our letters are lower case

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this style of writing a variable we call camel case

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in camel case only first letter of first word is small and rest of the first letters of other words are capital

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and similarly we also have pascal case in which all first letters of all words are upper case

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way we have multiple cases in programming

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now we can create variables in python in any case

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: but the styling of python tells us that we should prefer snake case in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for our variables as well as our functions

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: because generally we see existing functions in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we see existing libraries

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in that also snake case is followed so we also have to follow snake case in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: which means that if we want to make a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: which is called total price

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so we will create it in this way

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and we can store any value in it

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if i want to create a variable called full name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in full name we can write our values in this way

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so we will learn python's styling by writing code in class

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: along with that there are also style guides in multiple companies

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if we join any big MNC

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so there is a style guide which is followed and according to that code is written

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: but for now as a beginner

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if we want then google has a python style guide

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: google has guides for all the different programming languages

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so this is a style guide of python which we will follow

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now as such we don't have to remember the style guide

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: neither we are going to go through it in detail

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: but this is something which you have after watching the lectures

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if you have some free time then we can go through this guide

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so as we will read our advanced concepts

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: similarly we will improve our writing style in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so as such there is no syntax or rules in the guide

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: just to present things in a better way

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: is the way of writing in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now let's suppose by using all our knowledge till now

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now we have to write a program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: to calculate

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: sum of two numbers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so how will we write this program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: basically we should have two numbers to calculate sum

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so first of all we will create two variables in our code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: a and b

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can assign any value to a and b

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for now a could be 5, b could be 10

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and we will take a third variable sum

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in which we can add a plus b

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way we can add variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now we will see in detail what are the different operations

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: other than adding to perform

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: but for now as we write in math

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: similarly we have written that a plus b sum

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: will be stored in the sum variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and we will print the sum

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: let's save it

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and run our code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so we will get the answer 15k equal

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way this is basically a program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: to calculate sum of two numbers
